name: matrixscroll-mcp
description: Provenance-only MCP for AI agent governance: RFC 8032 Ed25519 commit envelopes, universal action types (ci_step, iac_change, db_migration, api_call, contract_deploy), offline verify, Scroll Gate CI (partial SLSA L1–2), audit export, and SE050 hardware preview. Hosted features require ssx360.com API key.
